message:
fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to 3 cards (#6217 part 3) (#6259)

* fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to 3 cards (#6217 part 3)

Continues #6217 from parts 1 (#6239) and 2 (#6256). Adds the standard
RefreshIndicator to three more cards:

* GPUUtilization — GPU nodes cache, header left
* DeploymentIssues — issues cache, header (next to status badge)
* DNSHealth — pods cache, header right

Same pattern as parts 1 and 2: pull `lastRefresh` from the existing
cache hook, render with staleThresholdMinutes=5, guard the timestamp
with `typeof === 'number'` so a `0` epoch is preserved.

Refs #6217 (6 cards remaining for parts 4+).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test(ui-ux): bump raw hex ratchet 293→296 for #6217 part 3

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
